overall.description: First-person exploration of a flooded futuristic urban environment from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily through overgrown vegetation into shallow water, wading toward neon-lit skyscrapers under an overcast sky with prominent water reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown urban flood zone with tall grass and palm trees

events.description: approaching the flooded area, shallow water becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through dense vegetation and muddy ground toward the flooded urban area

entered.detail: dense overgrown grass and vegetation covering the muddy ground
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the approach
futuristic building with prominent 'softsys' signage and neon displays
tall modern glass towers with illuminated windows and advertisements
large glowing advertisement screens on building facades
reddish rocky terrain formation on the right side of the flooded area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an overgrown urban flood zone with dense tall grass and palm trees. The camera moves forward through muddy terrain toward a shallow flooded area, with futuristic skyscrapers and neon billboards visible in the distance under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with reflective water surface

events.description: steps into the shallow water, transitioning from muddy ground to flooded street

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water toward the city skyline, creating ripples with each step

entered.detail: shallow water covering the ground with visible rocks and debris beneath the surface
clear reflections of skyscrapers and neon signs visible in the water surface

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shallow flooded street, wading through water that reflects the towering glass skyscrapers and neon signage ahead. The vegetation is left behind as the scene opens into the waterlogged urban area with the rocky outcrop becoming more prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded plaza approaching rocky outcrop and building complex

events.description: slight turn to the right while wading, shifting focus toward the rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through the flooded area with a slight turn toward the rocky terrain on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera continues wading through the flooded plaza, turning slightly toward the reddish rocky outcrop on the right. The skyscrapers shift to the left side of the frame as the perspective changes, with the rocky terrain now dominating the right side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wild, overgrown flood zone into a waterlogged urban plaza dominated by futuristic architecture. It begins by pushing through dense tall grass and palm trees across muddy terrain, with neon billboards and skyscrapers looming in the distance under an overcast sky. As the camera enters the shallow flooded street, the vegetation recedes and the scene opens up, revealing towering glass buildings reflected in the shimmering water. The perspective then shifts as the camera wades further into the plaza, turning slightly to bring a prominent reddish rocky outcrop into focus on the right. Finally, the skyscrapers drift toward the left side of the frame as the rugged rocky terrain becomes the dominant feature of the landscape.
